# OWASP SIST Website AI Instructions

You are building a world-class cybersecurity chapter website for the OWASP SIST Student Chapter.

## Design Philosophy

The website must feel:

- premium
- minimal
- modern
- cyber-secure
- enterprise-grade
- developer-focused

The aesthetic should resemble:

- Linear
- Stripe
- Vercel
- Clerk
- Framer

NOT:
- hacker movie UI
- gaming dashboard
- excessive neon
- overcrowded cyberpunk visuals

---

## Technical Stack

Use:

- Next.js App Router
- TypeScript strict mode
- Tailwind CSS
- shadcn/ui
- Framer Motion
- Lucide React

Always prioritize:
- accessibility
- performance
- reusable components
- responsive design
- clean architecture

---

## UI Rules

Use:
- dark matte backgrounds
- subtle gradients
- clean spacing
- smooth animations
- rounded-2xl cards
- soft borders
- blurred lighting effects

Avoid:
- excessive glow
- rainbow gradients
- too many colors
- heavy shadows
- flashy animations

---

## Color System

Background: #050816
Surface: #0B1120
Primary Accent: #00FFC6
Secondary Accent: #3B82F6
Text: #E5E7EB
Muted: #94A3B8

---

## Animation Standards

Use:
- fade reveals
- stagger animations
- smooth hover transitions
- scroll motion
- parallax sections

Avoid:
- bouncing animations
- chaotic motion
- unnecessary loaders

---

## Code Standards

- Use modular architecture
- Use reusable components
- Use server components where possible
- Use clean semantic naming
- Use TypeScript interfaces
- Use proper folder structure
- Always optimize for production

---

## Security Standards

Follow OWASP best practices:
- sanitize inputs
- validate forms
- avoid unsafe rendering
- protect APIs
- no hardcoded secrets

---

## Content Sections

The site contains:
- Hero section
- About OWASP
- Event timeline
- CTF archive
- Learning resources
- Team page
- Blogs/writeups
- Contact section
- Recruitment CTA

---

## UX Standards

The UI must feel:
- elegant
- calm
- sharp
- cinematic
- futuristic
- readable

Focus heavily on:
- whitespace
- typography
- spacing rhythm
- visual hierarchy
